papers.title: Appearance Pointers -- Multimodal Region Control of Diffusion Transformers
papers.abstract: Controllable image generation remains challenging for creative professionals, who often require precise regional control over materials, object identities, and spatial arrangements that cannot be reliably achieved through text prompting alone. Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) can natively ingest heterogeneous tokens stemming from texts and images, but they lack mechanisms for determining where and how these tokens should influence the output. We introduce appearance pointers, compact tokens that guide DiTs toward the correct appearance cues at the correct spatial locations by aligning text or image inputs with user-specified masks. Appearance pointers are produced by a region correspondence network and refined through a spatial aggregation mechanism, enabling the model to handle multiple regional descriptions without significantly increasing token load. Our approach introduces the first modality-agnostic interface for localized multimodal control in a DiT without retraining the base model from scratch. Across a range of metrics, our single model reaches or surpasses the performance of modality-specific state of the art methods, offering a simple and extensible path toward precise, region-aware, multimodal guidance in generative image synthesis.

ai_summary.problem: 可控图像生成中，现有方法难以实现精确的区域级多模态控制（如材质、物体身份、空间布局），扩散变换器（DiT）缺乏机制来指定输入token在输出中的影响位置和方式。
ai_summary.method: 引入外观指针（appearance pointers），即紧凑的token，通过区域对应网络生成并经过空间聚合机制细化，将文本或图像输入与用户指定的掩码对齐，引导DiT在正确的空间位置使用正确的外观线索，无需重训基础模型。
ai_summary.result: 在多个指标上，单模型达到或超越了特定模态的最先进方法，实现了精确的区域级多模态控制。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次为DiT提出了一种与模态无关的接口，用于局部多模态控制，无需重训基础模型。
ai_summary.relevance: 为生成式图像合成中的精确、区域感知、多模态引导提供了简单且可扩展的路径，推动可控生成和世界模型研究。
ai_summary.org: 机构信息未明确给出，可能来自Adobe Research等（部分作者有Adobe背景）

papers.title: Masked Visual Actions for Unified World Modeling
papers.abstract: Video models absorb rich priors over how the visual world moves, interacts, and responds to contact, making them promising substrates for robotic world modeling. The central challenge is how to communicate action to such models in a form aligned with the visual space in which they learned these interaction priors, yet still grounded in physical manipulation. We introduce Masked Visual Actions, a pixel-space control interface that expresses action as a partially revealed trajectory of an arbitrary entity in a video. Revealing robot motion makes the model act as a forward dynamics model that predicts the scene's response to low-level robot actions, while revealing desired object motion makes the same model recover robot behavior consistent with that outcome. Finetuned with only 15 hours of masked examples from real videos and simulation, a single checkpoint achieves strong visual fidelity and controllability across diverse scenes and multiple embodiments. In downstream manipulation settings, the model produces imagined rollouts whose outcomes correlate with real-world execution for policy evaluation, improves decision making by ranking candidate futures in model-based planning, and supports inverse modeling by synthesizing robot motion from desired object motion.

ai_summary.problem: 如何将机器人动作以与视觉空间对齐的形式表达给视频模型，使其既能作为前向动力学模型预测场景对动作的响应，又能从期望物体运动恢复机器人动作。
ai_summary.method: 提出Masked Visual Actions，一种像素空间控制接口，通过部分揭示视频中任意实体的轨迹来表达动作。微调时仅使用15小时的真实视频和模拟中的掩码示例，使单个模型适应多种场景和实体。
ai_summary.result: 单个检查点在多样场景和多实体上实现了强视觉保真度和可控性；下游操作中，生成的想象轨迹与实际执行结果相关，可用于策略评估、基于模型的规划和逆建模。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将动作表达为视频中实体的部分可见轨迹，统一了前向动力学和逆建模在一个模型内。
ai_summary.relevance: 为机器人世界模型提供了一种简洁、可扩展的动作表示方法，降低了对大规模标注数据的依赖。

contacts.name: Hadi Alzayer
contacts.affiliation: Stanford University; University of Maryland, College Park

papers.title: ExpertVerse: A General-Purpose Benchmark for Expert-Level Reasoning in Knowledge-Intensive Visual Synthesis
papers.abstract: Recent advances in multimodal generative models have enabled instruction-based image generation to move beyond semantic manipulation to knowledge-driven visual reasoning. However, these methods focus on explicit commonsense reasoning, shallow causal understanding, and direct knowledge recall, failing at knowledge-intensive generation. We develop \textbf{ExpertVerse}, a capability-centric benchmark to evaluate generative models via knowledge-intensive lens. ExpertVerse stratifies reasoning generation across an orthogonal taxonomy of \textit{9 cognitive capabilities} and \textit{8 expert disciplines}, yielding \textit{58 sub-disciplines}. We curate 1,611 expert-annotated instances covering single-image editing, multi-image composition, and text-to-image generation. We further develop an automated workflow to produce \textbf{ExpertVerse-100K}, a large-scale dataset with reasoning traces and knowledge-anchored rationale annotations. Based on this, we train \textbf{KnowThinker} with RL fine-tuning, a VLM reasoning engine with world knowledge that jointly generates thinking processes and refined instructions. Towards the cross-modal credit misalignment and multi-objective gradient conflicts in multi-reward optimization, we propose a tailored Bootstrapped Pareto Policy Optimization (BPPO), which synergizes Bootstrapping Reward Rectification (BRR) and Conflict-Aware Pareto Advantage Fusion (CPAF). Extensive results of both open-source and proprietary models exposes critical reasoning deficits, highlighting imperative for knowledge-intensive benchmarks towards next-generation visual generation.

ai_summary.problem: 现有视觉生成模型在知识密集型推理任务中表现不足，缺乏专家级认知能力和多学科知识整合能力，急需一个系统性的基准来评估和推动这一方向的发展。
ai_summary.method: 构建了ExpertVerse基准，包含9种认知能力和8个专家学科共58个子领域的1,611个专家标注实例，并自动生成大规模数据集ExpertVerse-100K；基于此训练了KnowThinker模型，通过强化学习微调，并提出了Bootstrapped Pareto Policy Optimization (BPPO)算法，结合Bootstrapping Reward Rectification (BRR)和Conflict-Aware Pareto Advantage Fusion (CPAF)来解决多奖励优化中的跨模态奖励不匹配和梯度冲突问题。
ai_summary.result: 在ExpertVerse基准上测试多个开源和闭源模型，暴露了现有模型在知识密集型生成中的严重推理缺陷，表明该基准对推动下一代视觉生成研究至关重要。
ai_summary.novelty: 提出首个以能力为中心的专家级知识推理基准ExpertVerse，并针对多奖励优化中的关键挑战设计了BPPO算法。
ai_summary.relevance: 为多模态生成模型从简单语义操控向专家级知识推理的演进提供了系统化评估工具和训练范式，推动AI在知识密集型视觉合成领域的进步。

papers.title: InstructMixup: Instruction-Guided Salient Patch Editing for Robust Data Augmentation
papers.abstract: In image and video technologies, data augmentation is widely used to improve the generalization of deep visual models, and mixup-based strategies that interpolate between samples have become the dominant approach. However, computing informative mixing regions adds substantial overhead, and blending content across different images frequently disrupts the semantic integrity of the resulting sample. We propose \our{}, a data augmentation method that constructs challenging yet label-consistent training samples entirely within a single visual sample. \our{} first extracts multi-scale salient patches from the sample using a lightweight saliency detector, refines each patch with an instruction-guided generative model, and blends the edited patch back into the non-salient regions of the same sample; because the generative edits are computed once and cached offline, this step adds negligible training cost. To further diversify the learned representation, \our{} injects self-similar fractal structure into the same salient regions at an adaptive ratio, so each training sample carries both fractal and non-fractal structure. We derive a second-order approximation of the resulting vicinal risk, showing that the method simultaneously enforces invariance to the generative edit and suppresses curvature along the perturbed salient directions, and we verify both predictions empirically. We evaluate on small to large backbones for instance Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Vision Transformers (ViTs) and Vision-Language Foundational Models (VLMs) across seven benchmarks covering coarse- and fine-grained classification, robustness to corruption and occlusion, calibration, and transfer and self-supervised learning, InstructMixup outperforms nine competing augmentation methods, surpassing the strongest baseline across all benchmarks.

ai_summary.problem: 现有mixup数据增强方法计算开销大且破坏样本语义完整性，需要更高效且保持标签一致性的增强策略。
ai_summary.method: 提出InstructMixup，通过轻量级显著性检测器提取多尺度显著区域，利用指令引导生成模型编辑并缓存这些区域，再以自适应比例与自相似分形结构混合，完全在单个样本内生成挑战性但标签一致的训练样本。
ai_summary.result: 在七个基准测试（涵盖分类、鲁棒性、校准、迁移和自监督学习）中，InstructMixup优于九种竞争方法，包括CNN、ViT和VLM骨干网络，并理论推导出其能同时增强生成编辑不变性和抑制显著方向曲率。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次结合指令引导的生成编辑与分形结构，仅在单一图像内进行数据增强，避免跨样本语义破坏且训练开销极低。
ai_summary.relevance: 为数据增强提供了新的鲁棒范式，对提升深度学习模型的泛化能力和应对分布外场景具有重要意义。
ai_summary.org: 作者机构未明确列出，可能来自多个研究单位。

papers.title: Two-Level Meta-Rubrics for Evaluating Open-Ended Generation: GAMUT, a Benchmark for Factual Completeness
papers.abstract: Evaluating the factuality of long-form generations has focused predominantly on precision, measuring whether the claims a model makes are correct. The dominant decompose-search-verify pipeline catches incorrect claims well but says little about whether a response contains all the information it should. Measuring factual completeness, the missing half of factuality, is harder: it requires enumerating the full set of facts a complete answer should contain, and these facts rarely form a flat list. They often involve open-ended sets where coverage is what matters, ordered processes, and relationships among facts that a list of independent boolean checks fails to capture. We introduce a two-level meta-rubric framework for evaluating open-ended generation, and instantiate it as Gamut (Grounded Assessment of Multimodal Factuality), a benchmark for factual completeness in long-form generation. The framework rests on a two-level rubric representation: a structured meta-rubric captures the organization and importance of the required content, which is then mechanically compiled into a flat checklist of binary, machine-gradable rubrics that an LLM judge scores reliably. We construct 1,813 questions grounded in real wearable imagery across 10 diverse domains, each paired with an evidence-backed rubric verified by expert human annotators. Because the framework is modality-agnostic, we also release a text-only variant. Evaluating 14 frontier and open-weight models, we find the benchmark genuinely challenging (best score 58.7% from Gemini 3.1 Pro), highly discriminative, and robust to the choice of judge.

ai_summary.problem: 现有长文本生成的事实性评估主要关注精确性（精度），忽略了事实完整性——即回答是否包含所有必要信息。这篇论文要解决如何系统性地评估开放生成的事实完整性问题。
ai_summary.method: 提出一个两级元评分框架：高层元评分描述所需内容的组织结构和重要性，然后机械地编译成可由LLM可靠评分的二元清单评分。并基于真实可穿戴图像构建了1813个问答对，形成GAMUT基准。
ai_summary.result: 在14个前沿和开放权重模型上，最佳成绩仅为58.7%（Gemini 3.1 Pro），表明该基准具有挑战性和高区分度，且对评分模型选择鲁棒。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将事实完整性评估形式化为两级元评分框架，并实例化为一个多模态、人类验证的基准测试，支持开放生成的结构化评估。
ai_summary.relevance: 为长文本生成和世界模型的事实完整性评估提供了系统化方法，填补了当前评估体系中对“缺失信息”的空白，对提高AI生成内容的可靠性和可信度有重要意义。
ai_summary.org: 未明确标注，但从作者姓名推断可能来自Meta AI研究

papers.title: Eversion-based robots can enable safe access,steering and endoscopic imaging within the spinal subarachnoid space
papers.abstract: Safe navigation within the spinal subarachnoid space is constrained by its narrow, compliant, and delicate anatomy. Conventional catheters and continuum robots rely on proximal pushing, generating friction and shear along the tissue device interface that limit distal controllability and increase the risk of neural injury. Here, we present a 2 mm diameter eversion-growing robotic platform that enables friction minimised extension and steering within the human spinal subarachnoid space, validated through computational modelling, phantom experiments, and intact human cadaver studies. The robot integrates a miniature endoscope for real time intrathecal visualisation and advances by pressure driven tip eversion, localising motion to the distal tip while minimising translational sliding of the deployed body. Phantom experiments demonstrated reductions of 65.2% in mean interaction force and 48.0% in peak interaction force compared with matched push-based insertion. Physics based modelling showed that eversion based growth redistributed tissue loading, reducing local stress concentrations and interfacial shear relative to conventional insertion. In an intact human cadaver, the system achieved 150 mm of controlled intrathecal extension with concurrent fluoroscopic and endoscopic visualisation, providing access across multiple vertebral levels from a standard lumbar entry point. Postprocedural laminectomy and durotomy revealed no observable macroscopic disruption of the dura mater or surrounding neural structures. These results provide the first mechanically characterised and multimodally validated demonstration of eversion-based robotic navigation in intact human spinal anatomy, establishing a quantitative and procedural foundation for future intrathecal interventions. Further validation in larger anatomical cohorts and under physiological conditions will be required before clinical translation.

ai_summary.problem: 解决在狭窄、柔软且脆弱的脊柱蛛网膜下腔中安全导航的问题，传统导管和连续机器人因近端推送产生摩擦和剪切力，限制了远端可控性并增加了神经损伤风险。
ai_summary.method: 提出一种直径2毫米的外翻生长机器人平台，通过压力驱动尖端外翻实现延伸和转向，将运动局限于远端尖端，最小化已展开主体的平移滑动，并集成微型内窥镜进行实时鞘内可视化。
ai_summary.result: 在人体尸体标本中实现了150毫米可控鞘内延伸，与传统推送式插入相比，平均交互力降低65.2%，峰值交互力降低48.0%，且术后未观察到硬膜或神经结构的宏观损伤。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次在完整人体脊柱解剖中通过计算建模、体模实验和尸体研究，机械表征和多模态验证了基于外翻的机器人导航。
ai_summary.relevance: 为未来介入手术的自主导航提供了量化基础，结合内窥镜视觉和压力控制，可与AI驱动的路径规划和力感知技术结合。
ai_summary.org: 未明确列出机构，但根据作者姓名推测主要来自伦敦大学学院（UCL）等相关机构

papers.title: GUIDED Network-Agnostic Feature Initialization for Spatial Transferability in GNN-based Models
papers.abstract: The Traffic Assignment Problem is a fundamental but computationally expensive component of transportation planning. While Graph Neural Networks have emerged as fast, data-driven surrogates, their practical deployment is severely constrained by a spatial generalization gap. Standard models rely on transductive feature initializations that tie travel demand to fixed network topologies, preventing seamless transfer to new urban environments. To overcome this structural limitation, this research proposes a network-agnostic initialization layer, termed Geometrically Unconstrained Inductive Demand EmbeDding (GUIDED). By injecting travel demand as a scalar attribute on auxiliary virtual links rather than as specific node features, this modular framework standardizes the input space regardless of network scale. Extensive experimental evaluation across multiple urban topologies demonstrates that a Heterogeneous Graph Attention Network (HetGAT) model integrated with the proposed GUIDED layer maintains state-of-the-art predictive accuracy on single-network tasks, while demonstrating superior robustness to out-of-distribution demand patterns and maintaining a distinct performance advantage over the baseline even under severe data scarcity. Notably, the proposed feature initialization enables highly parameter-efficient domain adaptation for inter-network transfer learning without artificial input homogenization, establishing a robust foundation for truly inductive models. At the same time, the optimized scatter operations of the initialization layer yield an approximate 50% reduction in training time per epoch compared to the baseline approach. Furthermore, while demonstrated on vehicular traffic, this fundamental abstraction of spatial topology provides a versatile blueprint for generalized origin-destination spatial problems, such as freight logistics and multimodal network optimization.

ai_summary.problem: 解决GNN模型在交通分配问题中的空间泛化差距，使其能高效迁移到新城市环境。
ai_summary.method: 提出GUIDED层，通过在辅助虚拟链路上注入出行需求作为标量属性，标准化输入空间，实现与网络拓扑无关的特征初始化。
ai_summary.result: 集成GUIDED的HetGAT模型在单网络任务上保持SOTA精度，对分布外需求鲁棒，数据稀缺时仍优，跨网络迁移高效，训练时间减少约50%。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次提出网络无关的初始化层，将出行需求与网络拓扑解耦，实现真正可归纳的GNN模型。
ai_summary.relevance: 为图神经网络的空间迁移学习提供通用框架，可推广至物流、多模态网络等起点-终点空间问题。

contacts.name: Alessandro Scalese
contacts.affiliation: Technical University of Munich, Arcisstrasse 21, 80333 Munich, Germany

contacts.name: Santhanakrishnan Narayanan
contacts.affiliation: Technical University of Munich, Arcisstrasse 21, 80333 Munich, Germany

contacts.name: Constantinos Antoniou
contacts.affiliation: Technical University of Munich, Arcisstrasse 21, 80333 Munich, Germany

papers.title: PathAgentBench: Benchmarking Evidence-Seeking Vision-Language Models on Whole-Slide Pathology Image
papers.abstract: Whole-slide image (WSI) diagnosis requires identifying diagnostically relevant regions, examining them across magnifications, and integrating multi-scale evidence. However, most existing pathology benchmarks evaluate models on pre-cropped patches or pre-extracted slide features, leaving their ability to acquire evidence directly from gigapixel WSIs largely untested. We introduce PathAgentBench, a benchmark for evaluating evidence-seeking vision-language models (VLMs) across four complementary capabilities: image-to-text matching for evidence interpretation, text-to-image retrieval for evidence verification, diagnostic-region localization for evidence acquisition, and multi-scale reasoning for evidence integration. The benchmark is organized as a diagnostic tree that links nested regions across magnifications with scale-specific findings and path-level diagnoses. It contains 1,822 TCGA WSIs and 17,135 diagnostic paths annotated by ten board-certified pathologists. An additional private cohort of 190 breast cancer WSIs with detailed annotations is used to evaluate autonomous whole-slide exploration. We evaluate 20 general-purpose, medical, and pathology-specialized models. Leading open-weight models achieve over 93% accuracy in multi-scale reasoning and over 50% accuracy in both cross-modal matching tasks. In contrast, diagnostic-region localization remains challenging: the best text-guided mean intersection-over-union is below 0.09, underperforming a simple center-based heuristic. During autonomous exploration, the unconditional hit rate decreases from 0.522 at low magnification to 0.185 at intermediate magnification and 0.020 at high magnification. These results reveal a pronounced gap between reasoning over curated evidence and acquiring that evidence directly from WSIs. PathAgentBench provides a unified framework for measuring and improving evidence-seeking pathology models.

ai_summary.problem: 现有病理学基准大多评估模型在预裁剪斑块或预提取特征上的表现，缺乏对模型直接从全切片病理图像（WSI）中获取证据的能力的评估。
ai_summary.method: 提出 PathAgentBench 基准，通过构建诊断树将嵌套区域与尺度特定发现和路径诊断联系起来，评估视觉语言模型在图像-文本匹配、文本-图像检索、诊断区域定位和多尺度推理四个互补能力上的表现。
ai_summary.result: 领先模型在多尺度推理上准确率超过93%，跨模态匹配超过50%，但诊断区域定位的文本引导平均交并比低于0.09，自主探索在高放大倍率下的未命中率仅0.020，表明模型在直接获取证据方面存在显著差距。
ai_summary.novelty: 首个专门评估证据寻求型视觉语言模型在全切片病理图像上获取、验证和整合证据能力的基准，并提供了统一的评估框架。
ai_summary.relevance: 该基准揭示了现有模型从被动分析到主动诊疗的关键不足，推动了病理人工智能向更实用的方向演进。

papers.title: IGGT4D: Streaming 4D Instance-Grounded Geometry Transformer
papers.abstract: Real-world spatial intelligence requires agents to understand scenes from continuous video streams, where objects move, persist, disappear, and reappear over time. While recent spatial foundation models have enabled generalizable feed-forward 3D reconstruction, most streaming methods remain geometry-centric and lack temporally consistent object-level understanding. Meanwhile, existing semantic reconstruction and 3D-aware vision-language methods largely rely on externally extracted 2D semantic cues or loosely coupled geometry inputs, limiting unified geometry-instance learning in long dynamic scenes. In this paper, we propose IGGT4D, a streaming instance-grounded geometry Transformer for online 4D scene understanding. IGGT4D processes video frames sequentially, reuses historical context through causal spatial-temporal modeling, and incrementally updates a unified representation of camera motion, geometry, and object identity. This enables long-sequence feed-forward reconstruction with geometry-instance consistency in dynamic environments. To address the lack of high-quality 4D supervision, we further construct InsScene4D-147K, a large-scale dataset spanning real/synthetic and static/dynamic scenes, with RGB images, depth, poses, and temporally consistent instance masks generated by an automated geometry-guided annotation pipeline. Experiments on 3D reconstruction, pose estimation, instance spatial tracking, and open-vocabulary segmentation demonstrate that IGGT4D outperforms existing streaming baselines while maintaining scalable online inference for long dynamic sequences.

ai_summary.problem: 针对连续视频流中的动态场景，现有方法缺乏时间一致的物体级理解，且几何与实例学习在流式重建中未统一。
ai_summary.method: 提出IGGT4D，一个流式实例接地几何Transformer，通过因果时空建模重用历史上下文，增量更新相机运动、几何和物体标识的统一表示；并构建大规模数据集InsScene4D-147K，通过自动几何引导标注生成时间一致的实例掩码。
ai_summary.result: 在3D重建、姿态估计、实例空间跟踪和开放词汇分割等任务上优于现有流式基线，同时支持长动态序列的可扩展在线推理。
ai_summary.novelty: 将实例感知与几何Transformer结合，实现流式4D场景的几何-实例统一在线重建，并配套大规模高质量4D标注数据集。
ai_summary.relevance: 推动4D空间智能向实时、在线、物体级理解发展，对具身智能和自主Agent等应用具有重要意义。

papers.title: Cognitive Dual-Process Planning for Autonomous Driving with Structured Scene Knowledge and Verifiable Reasoning-Action Consistency
papers.abstract: High-level planning for autonomous driving is a knowledge-intensive engineering decision task that requires accurate scene understanding, timely inference, and internally consistent action selection. Vision-language models (VLMs) can make intermediate reasoning explicit, but their use in deployed planners is constrained by costly structured supervision, unnecessary reasoning in routine scenes, and possible inconsistencies between generated rationales and driving actions. We present a cognitive dual-process planning framework that represents planning-relevant scene knowledge in a machine-parsable structured chain-of-thought (S-CoT) schema. An automated data engine integrates perception foundation models, critical-path filtering, and an expert VLM to generate S-CoT supervision without manual annotation of individual rationales. A lightweight visual Arbiter estimates scene complexity from multilevel vision-encoder features before language decoding and routes each input to either fast meta-action prediction or slow structured reasoning. For slow-path outputs, a deterministic rule-based validator checks whether the parsed S-CoT fields are consistent with the final meta-action and provides verifiable rewards for Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). In a 195-scene manual audit, the generated annotations achieve 91.8\% CoT accuracy and a 98.5\% Logical Consistency Score (LCS). On 574 manually verified NAVSIM test samples, the planner achieves 80.14\% planning accuracy and 97.20\% LCS while reducing average latency by 17.39\% relative to applying slow reasoning to every scene. Evaluation on external long-tail subsets further identifies conditions under which routing and planning performance degrade. Together, these results show how explicit scene knowledge can be operationalized through adaptive reasoning and rule-based verification to support high-level VLM planning decisions.

affiliations: School of Mechanical Engineering, Beijing Institute of Technology, Beijing, China
National Engineering Research Center of Electric Vehicles, Beijing Institute of Technology, Beijing, China

affiliations.name: Haoyu Li
affiliations: School of Mechanical Engineering, Beijing Institute of Technology, Beijing, China

ai_summary.problem: 解决自动驾驶高维规划中视觉语言模型的使用受限于昂贵的结构化监督、常规场景的不必要推理以及推理与动作不一致的问题。
ai_summary.method: 提出认知双过程规划框架，包括结构化链式推理模式、自动数据引擎（集成感知基础模型、关键路径过滤和专家VLM）生成监督；轻量级视觉仲裁器根据场景复杂度路由到快（元动作预测）或慢（结构化推理）路径；慢路径输出经规则验证器检查一致性并提供可验证奖励用于GRPO优化。
ai_summary.result: 在195场景人工审计中CoT准确率91.8%、逻辑一致性98.5%；574样本测试中规划准确率80.14%、LCS 97.20%，平均延迟降低17.39%。
ai_summary.novelty: 将认知双过程理论（快慢思考）与结构化场景知识表示及确定性规则验证相结合，实现自适应推理与推理-动作一致性保证。
ai_summary.relevance: 为自动驾驶高层次规划提供了一种可验证、高效且可靠的VLM部署方案，推动了世界模型在具身智能中的应用。
ai_summary.org: 北京理工大学（机械与车辆学院，电动车辆国家工程研究中心）

papers.title: ABot-World-0: Infinite Interactive World Rollout on a Single Desktop GPU
papers.abstract: We present ABot-World-0, an action-conditioned video world model for real-time, long-horizon closed-loop interaction, supported by a multi-source data infrastructure spanning AAA games, simulation engines, and internet videos to learn controllable world dynamics. WorldExplorer performs agent-driven collection guided by training feedback, while a unified pipeline applies 14 deterministic quality checks, VLM-based assessment, and synchronized action and text annotation. We progressively distill a bidirectional action-conditioned teacher into a causal student through teacher forcing and ODE distillation, and introduce LongForcing to align long student self-rollouts with an extended-horizon teacher, mitigating accumulated distribution shift and autoregressive drift. Raw keyboard actions provide a unified control interface for scene roaming and third-person character interaction, while reference-character memory provides persistent appearance cues for identity consistency during third-person rollouts. For deployment, we co-design a streaming inference stack with a lightweight VAE decoder, efficient attention, memory-aware scheduling, and low-bit DiT inference. Across optimized low-bit configurations, ABot-World-0 streams 720P video at up to 16 FPS on a single NVIDIA RTX 5090 desktop GPU, with 1.2s action-to-first-frame latency and approximately 19GiB peak VRAM. Experiments on WorldRoamBench and extended interactive rollouts demonstrate competitive controllability and coherent long-horizon world evolution.

ai_summary.problem: 解决在单个桌面GPU上实现实时、长程闭环交互世界模型的问题。
ai_summary.method: 构建多源数据基础设施，使用WorldExplorer进行智能体驱动数据收集，通过统一流水线进行质量控制、VLM评估和动作文本标注；逐步将双向动作条件教师模型蒸馏为因果学生模型，并引入LongForcing对齐学生自滚动与扩展时域教师；设计流式推理栈（轻量VAE解码器、高效注意力、内存感知调度、低比特DiT推理）以实现高效部署。
ai_summary.result: 在单个NVIDIA RTX 5090桌面GPU上，以16 FPS流畅生成720P视频，action-to-first-frame延迟1.2秒，峰值VRAM约19GiB，并在WorldRoamBench和扩展交互滚动中表现出竞争性的可控性和一致的长时域世界演变。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次在单桌面GPU上实现实时、长时域、闭环交互的视频世界模型，通过双向蒸馏、LongForcing对齐和协同设计的流式推理栈。
ai_summary.relevance: 降低了世界模型在真实世界交互（如具身智能、游戏）中的部署门槛，推动了低成本实时交互模拟的发展。

papers.title: One Model, Many Graphs: Learning over Attributed Graphs across Heterogeneous Modalities with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) provide a unified representation space for textual and visual information, yet their potential as general-purpose backbones for graph-structured data remains largely unexplored. In practice, attributed graphs exhibit substantial modality heterogeneity: some graphs contain only textual node attributes, others only visual attributes, while still others provide both. Existing graph learning approaches are typically designed for fixed modality schemas, requiring separate models for different settings and limiting scalability and cross-graph generalization. To bridge this gap, we present OMG-VLM (One Model, Many Graphs with Vision-Language Models), a unified framework for learning over attributed graphs across heterogeneous modality schemas. OMG-VLM leverages a pretrained VLM as a shared backbone and introduces structure-aware graph adapters that integrate neighborhood information while remaining compatible with the VLM's native embedding space. This design enables effective learning over text-attributed, image-attributed, and multi-attributed graphs within a single model. Extensive experiments across diverse domains show that OMG-VLM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art GNN- and LLM-based baselines on attributed graph learning tasks such as node classification and link prediction, while exhibiting strong generalization to unseen graphs and varying modality schemas. The source code is available at https://github.com/Jo-eyang/OMG-VLM.

ai_summary.problem: 现有图学习方法通常针对固定模态设计，无法统一处理仅含文本、仅含图像或同时包含文本和图像节点属性的异构图，限制了跨图泛化能力。
ai_summary.method: 提出OMG-VLM框架，利用预训练的视觉语言模型（VLM）作为共享骨干，并设计结构感知图适配器来整合邻域信息，使得单一模型能同时处理文本属性、图像属性和多属性图。
ai_summary.result: 在节点分类和链接预测等任务上，OMG-VLM一致优于基于GNN和LLM的最先进基线，并展现出对未见图及不同模态模式的强泛化能力。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将预训练VLM作为通用骨干用于异质模态属性图学习，通过结构感知适配器保持与VLM原生嵌入空间的兼容性。
ai_summary.relevance: 为图神经网络与多模态大模型的融合提供了新范式，有望推动统一图学习基础模型的发展。

papers.title: Advancing Multimodal Fusion on Heterogeneous Medical Data with Hybrid Geometry Attention
papers.abstract: Multimodal fusion learning (MFL) has shown great potential in the medical domain, where we are faced with disparate data modalities such as imaging, clinical records, and omics. However, existing MFL strategies face several major challenges. First, they struggle to capture complex cross-modal interactions effectively, which in turn limits performance improvements. Second, they incur high computational costs, restricting their applicability in resource-constrained healthcare AI applications. Finally, they are often designed and evaluated for narrow, fixed modality configurations (e.g., imaging-only, or specific pairs such as image and omics), which limits evidence of their adaptability and generalizability to broader collections of heterogeneous medical modalities. To address these challenges, we propose a novel MFL framework - Cascaded Unified Representation Learning for Efficient Fusion Network (CURE) - a lightweight and scalable framework that progressively integrates various modalities through a novel efficient Hybrid Geometry Aware Fusion layer (HyFuse), where each HyFuse layer is sequentially learned for each modality, making the framework adaptable and generalizable. Within HyFuse, an efficient residual convolution module captures rich multi-scale features to ensure cost-effective learning, while a hybrid-space aware attention mixer learns coarse-to-fine structural cues to better preserve cross-modal relationships. Complementary learnable late-fusion and shared information refinement modules are then employed to learn robust modality-order-invariant shared representations, which in turn yields consistent performance improvements. Extensive evaluations on 16 public datasets show that CURE outperforms leading multimodal fusion methods, boosting performance by up to 3.97% and lowering computational costs by up to 87.8%, ensuring more effective and reliable predictions.

ai_summary.problem: 现有医疗多模态融合方法难以有效捕获复杂跨模态交互、计算成本高且对异构数据适应性有限。
ai_summary.method: 提出CURE框架，通过级联的HyFuse层逐步集成各模态，每个HyFuse层包含高效残差卷积模块捕获多尺度特征，以及混合空间注意力学习粗到细的结构线索，并采用互补的可学习后融合和共享信息精炼模块学习模态顺序不变的统一表示。
ai_summary.result: 在16个公开数据集上性能提升最高达3.97%，计算成本降低最高达87.8%，超越主流多模态融合方法。
ai_summary.novelty: 提出混合几何感知融合层（HyFuse）和级联统一表示学习框架，实现轻量、可扩展且模态顺序无关的高效多模态融合。
ai_summary.relevance: 为资源受限的医疗AI应用提供了高效、泛化的多模态融合新范式，拓展了多模态学习在异构数据上的实用性。

papers.title: Quality Action Assurance: Multimodal Verification of Examiner Claims in VR OSCEs
papers.abstract: Objective Structured Clinical Examinations (OSCEs) are the gold standard for assessing clinical competence, yet scoring remains vulnerable to examiner subjectivity, fatigue, and cognitive bias. Standard examiner validation via inter-rater statistics lacks explanatory power regarding the source of errors, as it neither analyzes examiner reasoning nor verifies examiner claims against actual events. Thus, we introduce Quality Action Assurance (QAA), a multimodal framework that verifies examiner claims in Virtual Reality (VR) pediatric OSCEs by comparing actions claimed by examiners against the true sequence of events, constructed from video, VR logs, and actor data. QAA combines a constrained temporal action alignment model, which performs action localization and actor source attribution, with a large language model that extracts examiner claims and checks them against the record. Across a 5-fold cross-validation, QAA achieves 99.2% $\pm$ 0.7% Actor F1 and 93.4% $\pm$ 1.9% W@16 for temporal alignment. Overall, QAA detects examiner errors with 70.0% precision and 76.7% recall, improving factual correctness from 39.2% to 79.2%, enabling fairer OSCE assessment.

ai_summary.problem: 这篇论文要解决Objective Structured Clinical Examinations (OSCEs) 评分中审查员主观性、疲劳和认知偏差导致的错误，以及现有验证方法无法解释错误来源的问题。
ai_summary.method: 核心方法是提出Quality Action Assurance (QAA) 多模态框架，通过约束时间动作对齐模型（进行动作定位和演员来源归属）和大语言模型（提取审查员声明并核对真实事件记录）来验证审查员声明。
ai_summary.result: 主要结论是QAA在儿科VR OSCE中达到99.2%±0.7%的Actor F1和93.4%±1.9%的W@16时间对齐，检测审查员错误精确率70.0%、召回率76.7%，并将事实正确性从39.2%提升至79.2%。
ai_summary.novelty: 创新点在于结合多模态数据（视频、VR日志、演员数据）和LLM自动验证审查员声明，而非仅依赖评分者间统计。
ai_summary.relevance: 对AI领域的意义是展示了多模态融合与大语言模型在医疗评估验证中的实用价值，有助于提升评估公平性和透明性。
ai_summary.org: 作者机构未明确标注，但根据作者名字推测可能来自英国高校（如剑桥大学或相关研究机构）。

papers.title: No Training, Better Flights: Test-Time Scaled VLMs for UAV Navigation
papers.abstract: Test-time scaling offers a promising method to improve the inference performance of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) without additional training. Existing approaches to vision-language navigation (VLN) for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) typically relies on a single inference pass, which can falter in complex environments by producing suboptimal or unsafe trajectories. In this paper, we explore a simple and effective approach to apply test-time scaling to VLN for UAV. We enhance navigation reasoning through an iterative refinement process that requires no extra model training, guiding the model to re-evaluate its initial navigation plan for better accuracy and safety. Our method first prompts the model to generate multiple parallel candidates and then performs a self-correction step, achieving deeper and more robust planning without changing the underlying model. To further strengthen decision-making, we design a multi-criteria scoring function to evaluate the refined candidates based on safety, goal alignment, and forward-progress. This simple yet powerful combination enables a frozen UAV navigation VLMs to self-correct and generate more accurate and reliable flight plans, achieving SOTA performance in this task.

ai_summary.problem: 现有基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的无人机导航通常采用单次推理，在复杂环境下可能产生次优或不安全的轨迹。
ai_summary.method: 提出一种无需额外训练的测试时缩放方法，通过迭代式自我校正：首先生成多个平行候选路径，然后进行自我修正，并设计基于安全、目标对齐和前进进度的多标准评分函数来评估和选择最佳规划。
ai_summary.result: 在不修改底层模型的情况下，该方法使冻结的无人机导航VLM能够自我修正，生成更准确可靠的飞行计划，在该任务上达到了最先进的性能。
ai_summary.novelty: 将测试时缩放策略（推理时多候选生成+自校正+多标准评分）创新性地应用于无人机视觉语言导航任务。
ai_summary.relevance: 展示了无需额外训练即可提升VLM在具身智能（无人机导航）中决策鲁棒性的潜力，推动了测试时计算扩展在实际机器人任务中的应用。
ai_summary.org: 作者机构未明确列出，从姓名推断可能来自中国研究机构

papers.title: MeetingToM: Evaluating Multimodal LLMs on Theory-of-Mind Reasoning in Multi-Party Meetings
papers.abstract: Theory of Mind (ToM), the ability to infer other's beliefs, intentions, and states of knowledge, is central to social interaction, yet remains challenging for current Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs), especially in multi-party meetings where cues are distributed across speech and behavior. Existing multimodal ToM benchmarks mainly focus on video-grounded question answering over overt, externally verifiable signals, and provide limited coverage of latent social states and group dynamics. We introduce MeetingToM, a benchmark for complex social behavior reasoning in naturalistic multi-party meetings. MeetingToM targets meeting-specific phenomena such as \textbf{pseudo-consensus}, where apparent agreement masks private dissent under social pressure. The benchmark is hierarchically organized to evaluate ToM at increasing levels of social granularity, including (i) subject-level mental state prediction, (ii) dyadic-level addressee understanding, and (iii) group-level consensus reasoning. We provide a unified evaluation protocol and conduct systematic analyses of representative MLLMs, revealing persistent limitations in integrating non-verbal cues, inferring hidden attitudes, and distinguishing genuine consensus from pseudo-consensus. Our results highlight key challenges and establish MeetingToM as a testbed for advancing meeting-grounded ToM in multimodal models.

ai_summary.problem: 现有多模态心智理论基准主要关注基于视频的问答，缺乏对会议场景中潜在社会状态和群体动态（如伪共识）的评估。
ai_summary.method: 提出MeetingToM基准，采用分层组织方式评估个体、二元和群体层面的心智推理能力，并针对会议特有的伪共识现象设计任务。
ai_summary.result: 代表性多模态大语言模型在整合非言语线索、推断隐藏态度以及区分真正共识与伪共识方面存在持续局限。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次构建专门评估多模态大语言模型在多人会议场景中心智理论推理能力的基准，并引入伪共识等社会动态现象。
ai_summary.relevance: 为多模态大语言模型在复杂社交行为推理中的能力评估提供了标准化测试平台，推动会议场景下智能体的社交智能发展。
ai_summary.org: 未明确识别作者机构，但根据姓名推测可能来自中国高校或研究机构。

papers.title: Agentic Real2Sim: Physics-based World Modeling with Vision-Language Agents
papers.abstract: Real-to-sim conversion for robotic interaction with objects remains labor-intensive because it requires more than visual reconstruction: a streamlined real2sim process must recover scene geometries and object states, infer physical parameters, and assemble actors, objects, cameras, poses, and trajectories into a runnable physical simulation. Today this process still depends on manual tuning of visual foundation models, mesh cleanup, coordinate-frame alignment, and brittle workflow glue across visual perception tools and simulators. We introduce \textit{Agentic Real2Sim}, a framework for generalized physical world modeling with vision-language agents, converting a real-world recording of object-robot interaction into a simulatable episodic twin which preserves observations, geometries, robot interactions, and object states. We evaluate Agentic Real2Sim on rigid-object manipulation, deformable-object interaction, and humanoid motion scenes, spanning domains that are usually handled by separate Real2Sim pipelines, marking a first step toward scalable conversion. The framework's agentic decisions can be driven by an open-weight VLM backend at a small fraction of the cost of frontier models, while attaining comparable conversion success rate. We aim to use the resulting real-world-aligned twins for downstream robotics tasks, specifically policy learning and evaluation. The project site is available at https://ericchen321.github.io/agentic_real2sim.github.io/.

ai_summary.problem: 将真实世界的物体-机器人交互记录转换为可运行的物理模拟仍然非常繁琐，需要手动调整多个视觉模型和工具流程。
ai_summary.method: 提出Agentic Real2Sim框架，利用视觉语言代理（VLM）自动完成场景几何恢复、物理参数推断、以及角色-物体-摄像头-位姿-轨迹的组装，生成一个可模拟的场景双胞胎（episodic twin）。
ai_summary.result: 在刚体操作、可变形物体交互和人形运动场景上均成功实现了Real2Sim转换，使用开源VLM后端即可达到与前沿模型相当的转换成功率，且成本大幅降低。
ai_summary.novelty: 首次将视觉语言代理作为通用自动化引擎，统一了以往需要不同管线处理的多种物体交互场景的Real2Sim转换。
ai_summary.relevance: 为机器人学中的策略学习与评估提供了可扩展的物理世界建模新范式，降低了从真实数据到仿真环境的转换成本。
ai_summary.org: 未明确识别机构，可能为高校或研究所

papers.title: Breaking the Homogeneity Assumption: Specialized Multi-Generator Adversarial Learning for Rare Failure Detection in Predictive Maintenance
papers.abstract: Supervised learning models in the predictive maintenance field are regularly trained on highly imbalanced industrial datasets: machine failures occur rarely but have a disproportionate effect on operations. In addition to the clear class disparity, failure data are typically non-homogeneous, with different failure modes arising from distinct physical processes and exhibiting a multimodal distribution across minorities and classes. Traditional imbalance-management methods, e.g., undersampling, SMOTE-based interpolation, or cost-sensitive learning, typically assume that the minority population is homogeneous. This means their effectiveness is severely limited in the multifaceted conditions encountered in industrial practice. This paper determines the possibility of a failure-type-conscious generative augmentation program to improve the identification of infrequent failures in predictive maintenance systems. An experimental design that is leakage-safe is used to compare five imbalance-handling methods: cost-sensitive learning, random undersampling, SMOTE oversampling, single-generator GAN augmentation, and a specialized multi-generator GAN architecture that has independent generators that are asked to learn individual failure subtypes. Precision/Recall-oriented measures are used to quantify model performance; the main evaluation measure is the PR-AUC. Experiments conducted on the AI4I 2020 predictive maintenance dataset indicate that the proposed multi-generator GAN framework produces more realistic minority samples, yielding higher PR-AUC and recall scores compared to traditional resampling methods and individual-generator GAN augmentation.

ai_summary.problem: 预测性维护中，故障数据不仅类别严重不平衡，而且不同故障模式源自不同物理过程，呈现多模态非均匀分布，传统假设少数类同质的方法效果受限。
ai_summary.method: 提出一种专门的多生成器对抗网络架构，每个生成器独立学习一个故障子类型，生成更真实的少数类样本；采用泄漏安全的实验设计，与成本敏感学习、随机欠采样、SMOTE和单生成器GAN等方法对比，使用PR-AUC等指标评估。
ai_summary.result: 在AI4I 2020数据集上，多生成器GAN相比传统重采样和单生成器GAN，生成更真实的少数样本，获得更高的PR-AUC和召回率。
ai_summary.novelty: 打破同质性假设，针对不同故障模式设计独立生成器进行生成对抗学习，实现故障类型感知的数据增强。
ai_summary.relevance: 为工业预测性维护中罕见故障检测提供了有效的生成式方法，并可能推广到其他非均匀多模态的罕见事件检测场景。

papers.title: Context-structured Video Anomaly Detection with Large Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Training video anomaly detectors is challenging due to the difficulty and cost of annotating diverse and rare abnormal events. Although recent large vision-language models enable training-free inference, existing approaches mostly rely on holistic inference over sampled video and may miss context-specific anomaly cues. In this paper, we present CSI-VAD, a training-free video anomaly detector that identifies abnormal events across diverse contexts. The key idea is to decompose each video into three distinct contexts (environment, objects, time) and perform context-specific inference in separate branches. Because we ground anomaly judgments solely in context-specific visual cues, we do not require predefined text prompts describing abnormal events or dataset-specific tuning. Experiments on UCF-Crime and UBnormal show that CSI-VAD consistently improves over the direct holistic baseline and achieves competitive performance against existing methods, showing the advantage of structured context decomposition for training-free video anomaly detection.

ai_summary.problem: 视频异常检测中，由于异常事件多样且标注困难，现有基于大视觉语言模型的无训练方法多依赖整体推理，可能遗漏上下文特定的异常线索。
ai_summary.method: 提出CSI-VAD，一种无需训练的视频异常检测器，将视频分解为环境、对象和时间三种上下文，通过分支分别进行上下文特定的推理，无需预定义文本提示或数据集微调。
ai_summary.result: 在UCF-Crime和UBnormal数据集上，CSI-VAD一致优于直接整体推理基线，并达到与现有方法竞争的性能。
ai_summary.novelty: 通过结构化的上下文分解（环境、对象、时间）实现无训练的视频异常检测，将异常判断限定于上下文特定的视觉线索。
ai_summary.relevance: 展示了结构化上下文分解对提升无训练视频异常检测能力的优势，为多模态大模型在视频理解中的应用提供了新视角。
ai_summary.org: 作者机构未明确列出，但推测来自韩国研究机构（基于姓名）。

papers.title: Mage-Flow: An Efficient Native-Resolution Foundation Model for Image Generation and Editing
papers.abstract: Large-scale visual generators are increasingly capable but costly to train, fine-tune, and deploy. We introduce Mage-Flow, a compact 4B-scale generative stack for efficient text-to-image generation and instruction-based image editing. The stack is built from two co-designed components: Mage-VAE, a lightweight high-fidelity latent tokenizer, and a Native-Resolution Multimodal Diffusion Transformer trained with rectified flow matching. Mage-VAE uses one-step diffusion-style encoding and decoding with anchor-latent regularization, preserving the reconstruction quality of strong public VAEs while reducing tokenization cost by more than an order of magnitude. Together with native-resolution packing and stack-level CUDA kernel fusion, the stack supports flexible-resolution training and improves end-to-end training throughput by about $2.5\times$. Built on this foundation, we develop a complete model family with Base, RL-aligned, and Turbo variants for both generation and editing. Diffusion-NFT improves prompt following, text rendering, aesthetic quality, and editing fidelity, while few-step distillation with adversarial perceptual guidance produces 4-step Turbo models for low-latency inference. Despite its compact scale, Mage-Flow and Mage-Flow-Edit achieves competitive performance across standard generation and editing benchmarks. More importantly, the Turbo variants make high-resolution generation and editing practical for interactive use: at $1024^2$ resolution on a single NVIDIA A100 GPU, Mage-Flow-Turbo generates an image in 0.59s, and Mage-Flow-Edit-Turbo edits an image in 1.02s, while maintaining a small memory footprint. These results show that careful tokenizer--backbone--system co-design can deliver strong high-resolution generation and editing within an efficient 4B model family.

ai_summary.problem: 这篇论文要解决大型视觉生成模型训练、微调和部署成本高昂的问题，旨在实现高效的原生分辨率图像生成与编辑。
ai_summary.method: 提出Mage-Flow，一种紧凑的4B参数生成栈，包含轻量级高保真潜在分词器Mage-VAE（采用单步扩散式编解码和锚点潜在正则化）和原生分辨率多模态扩散Transformer（基于整流流匹配训练），并通过原生分辨率打包和栈级CUDA内核融合优化端到端吞吐量。在此基础上发展出Base、RL对齐和Turbo变体，其中Turbo模型通过少步蒸馏和对抗感知指导实现低延迟推理。
ai_summary.result: Mage-Flow-Turbo可在单张NVIDIA A100 GPU上以1024²分辨率在0.59秒内生成图像，Mage-Flow-Edit-Turbo在1.02秒内编辑图像，且在标准生成和编辑基准上达到竞争力性能，同时保持较小内存占用。
ai_summary.novelty: 创新点在于分词器-骨干网络-系统协同设计，通过高效轻量级分词器和原生分辨率处理，在紧凑4B模型规模下实现高性能与低延迟的平衡。
ai_summary.relevance: 该工作展示了通过精心协同设计可在有限参数下实现高分辨率视觉生成与编辑的实用化，对降低大模型部署门槛、推动交互式应用具有重要意义。
